news.headline: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE: ROL) increases regular quarterly cash dividend by 10% to $0.165 per share, payable on December 10, 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Rollins, Inc. (NYSE: ROL), a leading global consumer and commercial services firm, disclosed that the Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend for its common stock. The dividend amount is $0.165 per share and will be disbursed on December 10, 2024 to shareholders.

news.headline: Agree Realty Corp. reports Q3 2024 results, raises acquisition guidance to $850M, record liquidity over $1.9B.
news.summary: Agree Realty Corporation (NYSE: ADC) based in Royal Oak, Michigan, has increased its 2024 Acquisition Guidance to around $850 million due to robust Capital Markets Activities. The company has achieved a record liquidity of over $1.9 billion. This information was disclosed on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Allison Ventures invests in Agtonomy, an AI-enabled software for agriculture. Indianapolis, Oct 22, 2024.
news.summary: Allison Ventures, the venture capital division of Allison Transmission, recently made an investment in a cutting-edge software and services company that focuses on AI-powered automation software for agriculture and land maintenance. This significant investment was made public on October 22, 2024, at Indianapolis.

news.headline: Waterstone Financial, Inc. reported net income of $4.7 million for Q3 2024. Consolidated return on average assets was 0.83%. Community Banking pre-tax income was $5.6 million, with a total of $1.69 billion in average loans held for investment. The Mortgage Banking segment saw pre-tax income of $144,000, with loan originations decreasing to $558.7 million. Nonperforming assets were at 0.25% of total assets, and dividends declared were $0.15 per common share.(metrics and numbers may vary based on the company's financial performance)
news.summary: Waterstone Financial, Inc. reported a net income of $4.7 million for the quarter ended September 30, 2024, compared to $3.3 million for the same period in 2023. Consolidated return on average assets was 0.83%, and return on average equity was 5.55% for the quarter ended September 30, 2024. Dividends declared during this quarter totaled $0.15 per common share. The Community Banking segment had a pre-tax income of $5.6 million, with an average of $1.69 billion in loans held for investment. The Mortgage Banking segment recorded a pre-tax income of $144,000 with $558.7 million in loan originations. Waterstone Financial also engaged in share repurchases and declared a dividend during this period. The company's book value per share was $17.58 at September 30, 2024.

news.headline: First Community Bank announced Q3 2024 results with $13.03M net income, a cash dividend of $0.31 per share, and assets at $3.22B.
news.summary: First Community Bankshares, Inc. reported its financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2024. The company had a net income of $13.03 million for the quarter and $38.56 million for the nine months ended September 30, 2024. They declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.31 per common share, payable to shareholders of record on November 8, 2024. The company repurchased 12,854 common shares during the quarter and had consolidated assets totaling $3.22 billion at September 30, 2024. Nonperforming loans to total loans increased to 0.82%, and net charge-offs for the quarter were $1.13 million. The company's book value per share at September 30, 2024, was $28.47. Key financial measures showed a decrease in net interest income, an increase in noninterest income, and a decrease in noninterest expense. Annualized return on average assets was 1.60% for the quarter and the first nine months of 2024. The company disclosed non-GAAP financial measures and operates through its subsidiary, First Community Bank, with 53 branch locations in four states and managing assets worth $1.64 billion. Additional details can be found on their website.

Authorities are urging the public to follow guidelines to curb the spread of the virus and avoid overwhelming medical facilities.

news.headline: White Cap will acquire Triumph Geo-Synthetics, Inc., a geosynthetics distributor, on Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: In Atlanta on October 22, 2024, White Cap, a top distributor of specialty construction supplies and safety products for professional contractors, announced its plans to acquire Triumph Geo-Synthetics, Inc., a distributor specializing in geosynthetics and erosion control. This acquisition is part of a definitive agreement between the two companies.

news.summary: On October 22, 2024, a report on the influence of AI on market trends revealed significant insights. The Global Automotive Winches System (AWS) Market is projected to increase by USD 151 million between 2024 and 2028, states a study by Technavio. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.27% throughout this period.

news.headline: TI reports Q3 2024 revenue of $4.15B, net income of $1.36B, and EPS of $1.47, with 3-cent benefit.
news.summary: Today, Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) announced their financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The company reported a revenue of $4.15 billion, with a net income of $1.36 billion. Earnings per share were at $1.47, factoring in a 3-cent benefit for certain items.

news.headline: First Community Bankshares, Inc. reported net income of $13.03 million for Q3 2024 and $38.56 million for the first 9 months.
news.summary: In its recent report for the quarter ended September 30, 2024, First Community Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCBC) based in Bluefield, Virginia, disclosed an unaudited net income of $13.03 million, equivalent to $0.71 per diluted common share. For the nine-month period ending September 30, 2024, the company posted a net income of $38.56 million, or $2.09 per diluted common share. These figures were released on October 22, 2024, and are accessible on the Company's official website at www.firstcommunitybank.com.

news.headline: Teekay Group to reveal Q3 2024 earnings on October 30, 2024. Include Teekay Corporation and Teekay Tankers.

(NYSE:TNK), collectively known as the Teekay Group, are set to announce their financial results for Q3 2024 on October 30, 2024, after the market closes. news.headline: ProQR announces underwritten public offering of ordinary shares, with underwriters having option to purchase up to 15% more.
news.summary: ProQR Therapeutics N.V., headquartered in Leiden, Netherlands, and Cambridge, Massachusetts, made an announcement on Oct. 22, 2024, regarding the commencement of an underwritten public offering of its ordinary shares. The company, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol PRQR, is known for its innovative RNA therapies utilizing the Axiomer™ RNA editing technology platform. In this Offering, all shares are being put up by ProQR, with the underwriters potentially having a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional 15% of the offering amount in ordinary shares, at the public offering price minus underwriting discounts and commissions. The completion of the Offering depends on market conditions and other factors, and there is uncertainty regarding its finalization or the specific terms.

news.summary: London-based Kiniksa Pharmaceuticals International, plc, listed on Nasdaq as KNSA, will be conducting a conference call and live webcast on October 29, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to disclose its third quarter financial results for 2024 and discuss recent portfolio developments.

(Nasdaq: BIVI) disclosed the completion of its registered direct offering of 4,443,000 common stock shares at $1.50 per share under Nasdaq rules. BioVie focuses on developing drug therapies for chronic conditions like liver disease and neurological disorders.

news.headline: Eos Energy Enterprises to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 5; conference call on Nov 6 at 8:30 AM ET.

The company, known for its zinc-based long duration energy storage systems, will conduct a conference call the subsequent morning, November 6, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to address the results.

news.headline: Genelux starts Phase 2 trial for Olvi-Vec in Lung Cancer; compares efficacy of Olvi-Vec combo with docetaxel.
news.summary: A new clinical trial called VIRO-25 is set to evaluate the effectiveness and safety of olvimulogene nanovaccine (Olvi-Vec) in combination with platinum-doublet chemotherapy and a physician-selected immune checkpoint inhibitor for patients with recurrent non-small cell lung cancer. This trial aims to compare this treatment regimen with standard docetaxel therapy. The study will involve a significant number of participants with recurrent non-small cell lung cancer and will provide valuable insights into the potential benefits of this novel approach.

news.headline: Waterstone Financial, Inc. reported net income of $4.7M (or $0.26 per share) for Q3 2024, up from $3.3M in Q3 2023. Nine-month net income per share was $0.72 in 2024 vs. $0.46 in 2023.
news.summary: In Wauwatosa, Wisconsin, on October 22, 2024, Waterstone Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: WSBF), the parent company of WaterStone Bank, announced a net income of $4.7 million, equating to $0.26 per diluted share, for the quarter ending September 30, 2024. This marked an increase from the $3.3 million net income, or $0.16 per diluted share, reported for the same quarter in 2023. For the nine months ending September 30, 2024, the net income per diluted share was $0.72, compared to $0.46 per diluted share for the nine months ending September 30, 2023.

news.headline: Amlan International appoints Pinyo Kantasakorn as Regional Sales Manager for Asia Pacific, driving growth in animal nutrition sector.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in Chicago, Amlan International, a prominent developer of mineral-based feed additives for poultry and livestock farming, revealed the selection of Mr. Pinyo Kantasakorn as the Regional Sales Manager for the Asia Pacific area. Mr. Kantasakorn, with a wealth of experience in sales within the animal nutrition industry, is set to significantly contribute to Amlan's expansion efforts and market penetration in the Asia Pacific region. This strategic move is aimed at leveraging Mr. Kantasakorn's expertise to bolster Amlan's presence and propel its growth in the region.

In this role, Richardson will be responsible for driving the company's business growth and development strategies.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin trade sideways: Bitcoin at $67,436.75 (-0.03%), Ethereum at $2,626.50 (-1.7%), Dogecoin at $0.1395 (-2.3%). Transactions above $100,000 increased from 5,769 to 8,957 in a day, while 57,215 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours for $165.97 million.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are currently experiencing a period of relative stability, with prices remaining largely unchanged. Bitcoin (BTC) is trading at $67,436.75 with a decrease of 0.03%, Ethereum (ETH) at $2,626.50 down by 1.7%, Solana (SOL) at $168.23 showing a 1.3% increase, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.1395 down by 2.3%, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001823 with a 1.3% decline.Key data indicates a notable increase in large transaction volumes by 78.9%, while daily active addresses have decreased by 4.6%. Transactions exceeding $100,000 surged from 5,769 to 8,957 in a single day. However, exchanges netflows have seen a decline of 151%. The market also saw 57,215 traders liquidated in the past 24 hours, totaling $165.97 million in losses according to Coinglass data.In recent developments, Brad Garlinghouse has defended Ripple Co-Founder’s donation to Kamala Harris amidst discussions on XRP's classification. V3V Ventures made a $5 million investment in premium Telegram usernames to enhance crypto channel growth. Meanwhile, Donald Trump’s election odds have risen to 64% on Polymarket and 60% on Kalshi, making him the favorite in swing states, signaling potential market impact.For the full news story, visit Benzinga.com.

(NYSE:TOL), renowned for luxury home construction, unveiled its upcoming community, Foxtail Crossing, located near Tutt Boulevard and Dublin Boulevard. The Sales Center and Toll Brothers model homes will be built starting November, with sales commencing in spring 2025.

news.headline: AtlantiCare appoints Joseph V. Lombardi as Chief Physician Executive to enhance patient care with 30 years of experience.
news.summary: A highly respected cardiovascular surgeon with over 30 years of experience will be enhancing the standard of care in the region. AtlantiCare, a top healthcare organization in southeastern New Jersey and the largest in the area, revealed this development on October 22, 2024.

ERI and Sony Electronics team up for a free e-waste recycling event in Madison, Wisconsin at Alliant Energy Center.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin, ERI, a prominent electronics recycler and cybersecurity hardware destruction company, has partnered with Sony Electronics Inc. to offer Dane County and neighboring residents a convenient opportunity to recycle unwanted consumer electronics. This initiative will take place at a no-cost e-waste collection event at Alliant Energy Center this coming Sunday. ERI will be collecting all unwanted electronics for responsible recycling or refurbishment during the event.

news.headline: $20 eco-friendly hearing aid by Quantum Senses competes with expensive options, made from fully recycled materials.
news.summary: Quantum Senses is striving to provide a cost-effective and long-lasting option to the pricey hearing aids available in the market. This innovative product is crafted entirely from recycled materials, making it an eco-friendly choice.

news.headline: Market uncertainty on real estate due to recent rate cuts - Cohen & Steers VP - sources report.

Welltower to report Q3 earnings on Oct. 28, with expected revenue & FFO per share growth. Previous quarter beat estimates by 5%. Healthy portfolio in US, Canada, and UK markets.  Welltower's FFO per share beat Zacks estimate by 4.49% on avg in last four quarters. Company's SHO portfolio benefited from aging US population in Q3.
news.summary: Welltower, Inc. is set to announce its third-quarter 2024 results on Oct. 28 after the market closes. The Toledo-based healthcare REIT is expected to show year-over-year growth in revenues and funds from operations (FFO) per share. In the previous quarter, it reported a normalized FFO per share of $1.05, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 5%, with an increase in revenues. The total portfolio same-store net operating income (SSNOI) rose due to growth in the senior housing operating (SHO) portfolio. Over the past four quarters, Welltower has consistently beaten the Zacks Consensus Estimate for FFO per share, with an average beat of 4.49%. Welltower owns a diversified healthcare real estate portfolio in high-growth markets like the U.S., Canada, and the U.K. The SHO portfolio is expected to have benefited from the aging U.S. population during the third quarter.

news.headline: BTC options traders predict $80,000 as Trump victory odds surge. $69,000 rally driven by speculation.
news.summary: The recent surge in Bitcoin prices to $69,000 is suspected to have been primarily fueled by speculation surrounding the possibility of a Trump victory. In addition, traders dealing with Bitcoin options are suggesting that the digital currency may reach $80,000 in the near future.

news.headline: Buenos Aires introduces blockchain IDs for 3.6M residents on mobile devices with ZKsync Era protocol.
news.summary: The citizens of Buenos Aires now have the opportunity to use decentralized digital IDs on their smartphones, made available through the ZKsync Era scaling protocol.

news.headline: Investor predicts rising inflation, advises buying Bitcoin.
news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that a total of 2,500 individuals have been affected by the recent outbreak of a mysterious illness in the city. Out of this number, 500 have been hospitalized with severe symptoms while the remaining 2,000 are currently receiving treatment at home. Health authorities are closely monitoring the situation and have taken necessary precautions to prevent further spread of the illness. Additionally, emergency response teams have been deployed to provide medical assistance to those in need. Investigations are ongoing to determine the cause of this outbreak and officials are urging the public to remain vigilant and follow safety guidelines.

news.headline: SEC Chair Gary Gensler celebrates Bitcoin's 16th anniversary of its white paper, promising no change in SEC's crypto regulation.
news.summary: Gary Gensler, in a recent interview with Bloomberg, indicated that he does not intend to change the SEC's strategy of "regulation by enforcement" regarding cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Bitcoin's value to rise due to increasing hashrate, US inflation concerns, and supportive administration.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 7.5%, marking a significant uptick from the previous quarter. The number of unemployed individuals now stands at 12.3 million, which is a concerning development for the nation's economy. Furthermore, the report highlighted that the labor force participation rate has decreased to 62.8%, indicating a potential trend of people leaving the workforce. Economists are closely monitoring these figures as they suggest a shaky job market and potential challenges for the country's overall economic growth.

news.headline: Red Lobster names Bob Baker CFO in move to strengthen leadership team. Baker brings extensive industry experience.
news.summary: Bob Baker has been named as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of Red Lobster® in an announcement made on October 22, 2024, in Orlando, Florida. Baker, an industry veteran, brings with him extensive experience in the food industry, having worked across various sectors including full-service and fast-casual dining. This strategic move aims to leverage Baker's expertise to drive financial growth and success for the company.
